{
  "confidence_score": 0.95,
  "attack_summary": "An initial deceptive executable, 'happy_image.jpeg.exe', masquerading as an image, acted as a dropper, extracting and executing 'winx64_payload.exe' from a temporary directory. The payload then extensively modified system certificate stores, likely to establish trust or bypass security controls. Subsequently, 'procdump.exe' was used to dump LSASS memory for credential theft, followed by the deletion of 'procdump64.exe' to cover tracks. This represents a multi-stage attack chain.",

    "P[winx64_payload.exe|{19de6d3b-19a]",
    "P[procdump.exe|{19de6d3b-1a5]"
  ],

    "Credential Access"
  ],
